case_title: CHRISTOPHER GNIADY VS. BRIAN J. TERRY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,745.60 FILED BY GNIADY, CHRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY, BRIAN J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-17-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY, BRIAN J.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GNIADY, CHRISTOPHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TERRY, BRIAN J. $1,745.60 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,795.60, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN APRIL 25, 2011, PROVIDE TO PLAINTIFF A TINTED CORVETTE ROOF PANEL AS PROMISED BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2011 - DEPT. 506, JUDGE DON MITCHELL, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, MATTTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION (NO EXHIBIT).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2011 - JUDGMENT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY-CIVIL (WITHOUT COURT ORDER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GNIADY, CHRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY, BRIAN J.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,774.84 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY, BRIAN J.
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GNIADY, CHRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY, BRIAN J. NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GNIADY, CHRISTOPHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TERRY, BRIAN J. $3,569.84 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,569.84
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $13.69 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY, BRIAN J.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF EJ-195, WITH ATTACHED NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GNIADY, CHRISTOPHER SERVED MAR-11-2021, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY, BRIAN J.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN BERNARDINO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GNIADY, CHRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY, BRIAN J.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM MAILING ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GNIADY, CHRISTOPHER
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GNIADY, CHRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY, BRIAN J.

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN BERNARDINO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED WRIT RETURN RECEIVED **AFTER** THE ENTRY OF THE SC-290 ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY, BRIAN J.
